title: A Three-Level Framework for LLM-Enhanced Explainable AI: From Technical Explanations to Natural Language
description_es: Este trabajo presenta un marco de tres niveles para integrar modelos de lenguaje grande (LLM) en sistemas de IA explicable, facilitando la traducción de explicaciones técnicas a lenguaje natural comprensible.
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) offer unprecedented opportunities for generating human-understandable explanations from technical AI outputs. This paper presents a three-level framework for LLM-enhanced Explainable AI, bridging the gap between technical explanations and natural language communication. We demonstrate how LLMs can translate complex model internals into accessible explanations for diverse stakeholder groups.

citations.apa: Bello, M., Bello, R., García, M. M., & Sevillano-García, I. (2025). A Three-Level Framework for LLM-Enhanced Explainable AI: From Technical Explanations to Natural Language. Information Systems Frontiers.
citations.mla: Bello, Marilyn, Rafael Bello, María M. García, and Iván Sevillano-García. "A Three-Level Framework for LLM-Enhanced Explainable AI: From Technical Explanations to Natural Language." Information Systems Frontiers, 2025.
